title: Creamy Spicy Welsh Lamb Casserole
description: A romantic and spicy Welsh dish featuring lamb, brown rice, and cheese, perfect for a cozy night in. This kosher-friendly recipe is sure to impress.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: cured in salt and brown sugar for 24 hours

instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the lamb shoulder over medium heat until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, cayenne pepper, and dried thyme.
In a separate bowl, mix the heavy cream and shredded cheddar cheese.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the rice mixture, followed by a layer of the lamb and onion mixture, and finally a layer of the cream and cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of the cream and cheese mixture on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
